name: Brooke Peters Pickleball
description: Brooke Peters Pickleball is a place to play pickleball in Shippenville, PA. There are 2 indoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to trainers or lessons, lights, youth programming, and adaptive programming. The courts are private.

name: Clarion 2nd Avenue Park
description: Come play pickleball at Clarion 2nd Avenue Park in Clarion, PA! There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Clarion University Of PA Student Rec Ctr
description: Come play pickleball at Clarion University Of PA Student Rec Ctr in Clarion, PA! There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to lights.
